name: Crabby Mushrooms
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the crab meat, bread crumbs, onions, cheese, salt, parsley, and chopped mushroom stems.
2. Add the beaten egg and hot sauce to taste.
3. Stuff the mixture into the mushroom caps.
4. Bake at 300 degrees Fahrenheit until tender, for 15 to 30 minutes.
5. Serve hot.
